name: @moonshot-ai/vis
description: Debug visualization tool for kimi-code sessions

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run build:deps && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false --filter @moonshot-ai/vis-server build && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false --filter @moonshot-ai/vis-web build && node scripts/copy-web-dist.mjs
